briefing.art: Global art market grew 4% in 2025 to $59.6B, with strong optimism for 2026 driven by ultra-high-value sales like the Klimt portrait ($236.4M). March 2026 is active with events like the Affordable Art Fair (NY) running through March 22.
briefing.stocks: Global stocks showing positive trends despite volatility. US markets rise ahead of Fed policy decision. Indian benchmarks Sensex/Nifty continue gains, while crude oil prices retreat on increased supply.
